Sponsors Module - Grouped Content Reference
=========================================

This folder contains copies of all code related to the Sponsors and Partners.
This is for reference only; the original files remain in src/pages/ and src/components/ to preserve the application functionality.

Files included:
- Sponsors.jsx (Main page)
- AnimatedHero.jsx / .css (Sponsor specific hero)
- BorderGlowCard.jsx / .css (Sponsor profile cards)

Connections:
- Sponsors.jsx imports and uses AnimatedHero and BorderGlowCard.
- Original files in src/pages/ and src/components/ are the ones active in the production build.
